subcodes.title: Words spoken to Miss St. in Aug 1910
subcodes.first_line: Sei nicht Sklave, sondern Herr deiner Stimmungen. Bist du aber so verärgert, so gedrückt, so wund
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @compassion; kindness, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @mind as intermediary between soul and body, @order; organization; tact; deliberation [tadbir], @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
